name: phpty/screen-test
description: Drive a program through a pty and assert on the screen it renders. Framework-agnostic, with an optional PHPUnit assertion trait.

suggest.phpunit/phpunit: To assert on a rendered Screen from a PHPUnit test via PhPty\ScreenTest\PHPUnit\AssertScreen
suggest.yoast/phpunit-polyfills: For assertion compatibility across PHPUnit versions when using the trait on PHP 7.4-8.x
